summary: Amazon investing ~$200B CapEx in 2026 vs Walmart's disciplined $25B, but Walmart leads on free cash flow ($14.92B) and near-term returns. Costco has sharper grocery price edge (21.4% below Walmart). Target struggling under new CEO Fiddelke, losing market share to Walmart. Walmart U.S. e-commerce +27%, now 23% of net sales.
